# Transcrição: 4. Visit Your Customers in Person

- **Fonte:** 4. Visit Your Customers in Person
- **Duração:** 00:51
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 00:51]

Visit your customers in person. Look, you need to make personal contact with the people that can make things better for you. You can't do all this on Facebook and Twitter and just email. You've got to make contact with people. It's not enough. It is not enough to just be in the machine age. You want to go out and touch people. Something happens. I don't know. Something magical happens when two people meet two people and I keep meeting people. And I talked about that in earlier segments. Extrovert. Go reach the people. Meet people. Add people to your arsenal. There's something magical that happens when human beings, spiritual beings, touch one another. And it's not just machines and posts and email. Visit your customers in person. Add the number of people every day that you're going to visit in person and watch how motivated you get.
